message:
feat: use SQL-based flatten on running server, remove downtime

Simplify compactor dog, gt maintain, and gt dolt flatten to use direct
SQL (DOLT_RESET --soft + DOLT_COMMIT) on main instead of temp-branch
approach. Replace CLI dolt gc with SQL CALL dolt_gc(). Remove server
stop/start and rig parking from maintenance — all ops are safe on a
running server per Tim Sehn (2026-02-28).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
